project_type: Python AI Agent System with FastAPI web dashboard
test_framework: No formal test framework; validation via imports and syntax checks
test_command: cd /projects/sandbox/PRE-AIAgentJarvis/J.A.R.V.I.S_system && python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from core.knowledge.document_loader import DocumentLoader; from core.knowledge.rag_engine import RAGEngine; from core.tools.upload_tools import upload_to_knowledge_base, bulk_upload_directory; from core.knowledge.embeddings import SimpleEmbeddings; print('All RAG imports OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. Verify all new files are importable without error. 2. Verify existing core/knowledge/knowledge_base.py still works. 3. Check .env.example has new RAG entries. 4. Check requirements_v2.txt has new optional entries.
